CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.detect_concurrent_access()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

concurrent_found boolean;

begin

select

(

count(

distinct fingerprint

)

>1

)

or

(

count(

distinct session_id

)

>1

)

into concurrent_found

from public.concurrent_access_events

where

user_id=auth.uid()

and created_at>

now()

- interval '10 minutes';

return coalesce(

concurrent_found,

false

);

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.finalize_pdf_access(session_uuid uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

session_exists boolean;

begin

update

public.pdf_reading_sessions

set

closed_at=now(),

seconds_viewed=

greatest(

extract(

epoch

from

(

now()

-

opened_at

)

)::integer,

0

)

where

id=session_uuid

and user_id=auth.uid()

and closed_at is null;

select exists(

select 1

from public.pdf_reading_sessions

where

id=session_uuid

and user_id=auth.uid()

and closed_at is not null

)

into session_exists;

return session_exists;

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.generate_secure_asset(bucket_input text, path_input text, minutes_expire integer DEFAULT 15)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

registry_uuid uuid;

begin

insert into

public.signed_url_registry(

bucket_name,

asset_path,

user_id,

expires_at,

revoked,

access_count

)

values(

bucket_input,

path_input,

auth.uid(),

now()

+

make_interval(

mins => minutes_expire

),

false,

0

)

returning id

into registry_uuid;

return registry_uuid;

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_permissions()
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

result jsonb;

begin

select jsonb_build_object(

'roles',

coalesce(

(

select jsonb_agg(role)

from public.user_roles

where user_id=auth.uid()

),

'[]'::jsonb

),

'premium',

exists(

select 1

from public.subscriptions

where

user_id=auth.uid()

and status='active'

),

'admin',

public.is_admin(),

'super_admin',

public.is_super_admin(),

'trial',

exists(

select 1

from public.trial_access

where

user_id=auth.uid()

and converted=false

and ends_at > now()

)

)

into result;

return result;

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.increment_cache_hit(cache_key text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$

begin

update cache_entries

set

hit_count=

hit_count+1,

updated_at=

now()

where

cache_entries.cache_key=

increment_cache_hit.cache_key;

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_admin()
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$

select exists(

select 1

from public.user_roles

where user_id = auth.uid()

and role in (

'admin',

'super_admin'

)

);

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.platform_kpis()
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

result jsonb;

begin

select jsonb_build_object(

'total_users',

(

select count(*)

from public.profiles

),

'active_subscriptions',

(

select count(*)

from public.subscriptions

where status='active'

),

'total_revenue',

coalesce(

(

select sum(amount)

from public.payments

where status='paid'

),

0

),

'revenue_last_30_days',

coalesce(

(

select sum(amount)

from public.payments

where

status='paid'

and paid_at>

now()

- interval '30 days'

),

0

),

'published_content',

(

select count(*)

from public.content

where published=true

),

'total_downloads',

(

select count(*)

from public.downloads

)

)

into result;

return result;

end;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.recommend_content(limit_count integer DEFAULT 20)
 RETURNS TABLE(content_id uuid, score numeric, reason text, shown boolean, clicked boolean)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

select

rf.content_id,

rf.score,

rf.reason,

rf.shown,

rf.clicked

from

public.recommendation_feed rf

where

rf.user_id=auth.uid()

order by

rf.shown asc,

rf.score desc,

rf.created_at desc

limit limit_count;

$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.secure_video_permission(content_uuid uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

declare

allowed boolean;

begin

select

case

when c.content_type<>'video'

then false

when c.published=false

then false

when c.release_at is not null

and c.release_at>now()

then false

when public.is_admin()

then true

when public.validate_content_access(

content_uuid

)

then true

else false

end

into allowed

from public.content c

where c.id=content_uuid;

return coalesce(

allowed,

false

);

end;

$function$
